description: P1 local matrices for the reference tet with vertices 2 and 3 swapped — same shape as canonical_reference_tet but negative signed volume. Exercises the signed-volume diagnostic path; assembly K/M magnitudes use |det| so they match the canonical case. NumPy baseline produced by reference/numpy/p1_local_matrices.py via gen_p1_local_per_case.py.

coords.description: Per-element vertex coordinates [n_elem, 4 vertices, 3 spatial dims]. v2 and v3 are swapped vs. canonical reference tet.

k_local.description: Local stiffness K_{ij}. Identical to canonical_reference_tet (the |det| in the assembly cancels the orientation flip).

m_local.description: Local consistent mass M_{ij}. Identical to canonical_reference_tet.

signed_volume.description: Signed element volume V = det(J)/6. NEGATIVE because of the v2/v3 swap. This is the only case where the sign differs from canonical_reference_tet.
